meaning: n.自然神论,自然神教派(信上帝之存在及创世界,但对其所创造的世界及世人未加以支配)
examples: We must realize, however, that European Deism never took root in America.
This form of naturalism stands in close relation with Rationalism and Deism.
The founders themselves ranged from Christians to agnostics, but their center of gravity was a deism that accepted the duality of human nature.
